target.html:
Italian

Spaghetti Carbonara

A classic Roman pasta dish with eggs, cheese, and pancetta.

⏱ 25 mins
👤 2 servings
🔥 480 kcal

Ingredients

  • 200g spaghetti
  • 100g pancetta
  • 2 egg yolks
  • 50g Pecorino Romano
